completed_steps.summary: Classified as monolith with 1 part: web (Next.js 14 full-stack)
Found 19+ existing docs. 71 commits since last scan.
Tech stack: Next.js 14+, React 18, TypeScript, Prisma, MySQL, Stripe, Nodemailer, SSE
Exhaustive scan: 83 API endpoints, 16 DB models, 90+ components
Source tree documented with new display/, seating redesign, scanner redesign files
Dev setup, deployment, testing documented. 97/97 E2E tests.
Architecture document updated with SSE, display, seating redesign, scanner redesign
All supporting docs updated: api-contracts, component-inventory, data-models, dev-guide, project-overview
Master index updated with v4.1.0, new counts
